title: Vampirism Iron's Spells Compatibility
description: Vampirism mod now integrated with Iron's Spells Blood magic. Use your blood to reduce cooldowns, use blood ray and bite to restore blood!   Also aware of Holy spells!
body:
# Vampirism Iron's Spells Compatibility

Vampirism Iron's Spells Addon fuses Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks with Vampirism, giving vampires a bespoke spellcasting experience without touching the parent mods’ code. Everything happens at runtime through reflection, so the addon slides into existing modpacks with zero conflicts.

## What’s Inside

*   Blood-Powered Casting – Key blood spells now drain Vampirism blood with mana when a vampire is well fed. Drop below the threshold and the spell skips the blood cost but doubles its cooldown.
    
*   Signature Spell Rework
    
    *   Ray of Siphoning keeps dealing damage while restoring blood to vampire casters.
    *   Devour restores a hefty chunk of blood in return for a bigger mana bill.
*   Holy School Backlash
    
    *   Holy damage reflects onto vampire casters and hits Vampirism vampire mobs twice as hard.
    *   Holy heals hurt both the vampire caster and target, converting the heal into pure damage.
    *   Holy utility spells (Angel Wing, Sunbeam, Fortify, Wisp, Haste, Cleanse) simply sting vampires for 5 damage and fizzle.
*   Config Friendly – Tweak blood-to-mana ratios, thresholds, cooldown multipliers, and holy backlash values to fit your pack. Every knob lives in a simple server-side config.
    
*   Drop-In Compatibility – No compile-time dependencies, no bundled classes from the parent mods, and no extra assets. Just add the jar alongside Vampirism and Iron’s Spells and you’re done.
    
    ## Dependencies
    
*   Vampirism
    
*   Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks
    
    ## Status
    
    This addon has seen limited testing so far; feedback and contributions are very welcome! At the moment there are no plans to support other Minecraft versions or different mod loaders—the focus is squarely on the current Vampirism × Iron’s Spells combo.
    
    Happy haunting… and spellcasting!
